name: agent-bridge
description: Bridge Codex to local agent CLIs for planning, review, and delegated rescue work.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate planning, review, and rescue work from Codex to local agents
interface.longDescription: Agent Bridge lets Codex invoke local agent CLIs for architecture planning, code review, adversarial review, and explicitly write-enabled delegated tasks. The current bundled adapter uses Claude Code while keeping plan and review commands read-only.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude to plan this architecture
Ask Claude to review my current changes
Ask Claude to fix this issue
